summary: High‑quality audience recording of a beloved Fall ’94 show, though some listeners experience slow playback due to the 48 kHz master.
review: Reviewers rave about the clarity and fidelity of this audience (AUD) capture, calling it one of the best sounding sources from the fall‑1994 run. The only complaint centers on a perceived slowdown when the 48 kHz master is incorrectly down‑sampled to 44.1 kHz, not on the performance itself.

ai_rating.rationale: Two enthusiastic 5‑star reviews praise the recording and show, while one 2‑star review notes a speed issue caused by sample‑rate conversion; overall rating reflects strong show quality with minor technical confusion.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Mastered at 48 kHz, yielding superb clarity when played at native rate. Playback at 44.1 kHz causes the audio to sound slow; proper conversion is required.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewers simply note it as a favorite Fall ’94 performance.
